description: Canonical Measurement.type tokens for sleep telemetry (SPEC §4.1/§4.5, OB-13). Sleep stages are modeled as separate typed Measurements per stage — the same convention SPEC.md §4.3 already establishes for windowed aggregates (e.g. heart_rate_min/heart_rate_mean/heart_rate_max) — rather than inventing a bespoke sleep-session shape. A narrow, hand-curated seed, not an exhaustive taxonomy.
